'''Two-headed tortuce''' were a diverse [[Species/Legends|species]] that were found in many parts of the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Canastra IV]]. 

==Biology and appearance==
Like [[Troig/Legends|Troigs]], they were one of the few lifeforms found in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] with two brains. Multiple species existed, having adapted to numerous environments, from dry land to ocean depths. Like many reptiles, their lifespans could span over a century. They had a brain at the end of each neck which both connected to a nexus under the creature's shell. It was hypothesized that the nexus acted like an organic filter to handle the signals from two distinct brain centers.<ref name="CG" />

==Behavior==
The creatures were slow and traveled in large herds. They lacked the aggression to defend themselves to any great extent.<ref name="CG" />

==History==
While they lacked natural predators, they were a favored food of the sapient locals, and were vulnerable to hunting. Governmental attempts to outlaw their slaughter did not meet with success.<ref name="CG" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]''
